name: 04-20-skill-test-open-sandbox-typing-pass
title: Type open-sandbox helper clusters
description: 将 `server/domain/skill-test/open-sandbox-factory.ts` 里的 tool adapter 与 `startRun` 兼容 helper cluster 补显式类型，继续缩小 `@ts-nocheck` 影响面。
creator: 咕咕嘎嘎
notes: Standalone low-risk follow-up spun out after 04-20-skill-test-sandbox-type-hardening. Keep the default host-loop + sandbox-tools path unchanged, do not re-promote full-sandbox execution, and only type the open-sandbox helper clusters needed to shrink the remaining `@ts-nocheck` surface.
